summary: The diff implements the vast majority of the Jenkins Insurance demo site and admin panel requirements. Most frontend components, admin pages, backend Motoko changes, and routing are present. A few notable gaps exist: the JenkinsWhyChoose component is not shown, the JenkinsPublicSite.tsx page composition file is not present in the diff, the JenkinsFooter localStorage reading (REQ-13) appears limited, and the backend submitQuote integration from the public form calls the actor but the REQ-15 AC around 'guest' permission check may conflict with anonymous callers. Some hallucinated features are also present.

missing_requirements.requirement: JenkinsWhyChoose component ('Why Choose Us cards') must be built and composed into JenkinsPublicSite.tsx
missing_requirements.reason: No file for JenkinsWhyChoose.tsx appears in the diff (added or modified).

missing_requirements.requirement: JenkinsPublicSite.tsx must compose all 13 section components with document title 'Jenkins Insurance Agency | Greater Houston TX'
missing_requirements.reason: JenkinsPublicSite.tsx is not listed among the added or modified files in the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Mobile sticky bar shows Call Now and WhatsApp buttons (and 2 more) — the spec implies 4 buttons on the mobile bar
missing_requirements.reason: JenkinsStickyMobileBar.tsx only shows 2 buttons (Call Now and WhatsApp). The AC explicitly says '(and 2 more)', indicating 4 total buttons.

missing_requirements.requirement: Quote Requests page filter bar must include date range inputs
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminJenkinsQuotesPage.tsx diff is truncated but the visible filter state variables do not include date range inputs.

missing_requirements.requirement: All save buttons show a loading spinner while saving
missing_requirements.reason: The toast context and layout do not enforce a universal loading spinner on all save buttons. Some pages such as AdminJenkinsDashboard do not show save button spinners.

missing_requirements.requirement: JenkinsFooter must read its content from localStorage and fall back to hardcoded defaults
missing_requirements.reason: JenkinsFooter.tsx is shown as modified but uses hardcoded values for phone, email, and city list without any localStorage read logic visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each accordion section in Edit Website Content must have both a gold 'Save Changes' button AND a navy 'Preview Changes' button
missing_requirements.reason: AdminJenkinsContentPage.tsx is truncated and only 'Save Changes' button behavior is confirmed; the navy 'Preview Changes' button is not confirmed present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Quote form submission on public site calls the backend submitQuote function successfully for anonymous callers
missing_requirements.reason: The backend submitQuote checks AccessControl.hasPermission with #guest which may reject anonymous/unauthenticated callers from the public site form, breaking the AC.

hallucinated_features.description: AdminLoginModal component with username field and modal-based login UI
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 specifies a standalone AdminLoginPage with password only and no modal. A separate AdminLoginModal.tsx was added that includes a username input field, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: AppointmentsCalendarView component with a calendar grid showing appointments by day
hallucinated_features.reason: No calendar view for appointments was requested anywhere in the build request.

hallucinated_features.description: AdminAppointmentsPage showing backend quote submissions via useGetAllAppointments hook
hallucinated_features.reason: No Appointments page was requested. The admin panel routes are fully specified and this page is not among them.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/migration.mo module with OldActor/NewActor migration logic
hallucinated_features.reason: No data migration module was requested. REQ-15 only asked for submitQuote and getQuotes functions to be added to main.mo.

hallucinated_features.description: HoustonQuoteForm component as a separate Houston-branded quote form
hallucinated_features.reason: No standalone Houston quote form component was requested. The public form is specified as JenkinsQuoteContact inside JenkinsPublicSite.
